span.p: No: you serve a payment form on your domain

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: No: PSP JS SDK handles fields - you never see card data in your JS

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does your server ever receive, process, or store raw card data - PANs, CVVs, track data?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: STOP: you are out of SAQ-A - escalate to security-reviewer + QSA immediately

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Are all card data entry pages fully hosted by the PSP - no inline form on your domain?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SAQ-A eligible - verify the exact iFrame/redirect requirements with a QSA

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does your JavaScript handle any card field values?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Likely SAQ-A-EP or SAQ-D - escalate to QSA for full assessment
